data_sources.name: CatalogDb
data_sources.engine: PostgreSQL (Npgsql) — CONFIRMED via src/Infrastructure/Dependencies.cs UseNpgsql + appsettings.json (Host=localhost;Port=5432;Database=eShopCatalog). appsettings.Docker.json's SQL Server string is stale/legacy. See RC-001 in schema-catalogue.json.

data_sources.name: IdentityDb
data_sources.engine: PostgreSQL (Npgsql) — CONFIRMED via src/Infrastructure/Dependencies.cs UseNpgsql + appsettings.json (Host=localhost;Port=5432;Database=eShopIdentity). appsettings.Docker.json's SQL Server string is stale/legacy. See RC-001 in schema-catalogue.json.

data_sources.name: Browser localStorage cache (BlazorAdmin)
data_sources.engine: Browser localStorage via ILocalStorageService (Blazored.LocalStorage) — CONFIRMED, not IMemoryCache.
data_sources.notes: Decorator pattern wraps CatalogItemService / CatalogLookupDataService, caching results in browser localStorage keyed entries. CacheEntry<T> stores a DateCreated timestamp but no explicit expiry/TTL field — the staleness check logic was not located in this pass (still UNKNOWN, confidence < 0.70 for exact TTL value). See storage-pattern-analysis.md and RC-004.

data_sources.name: Browser cookies (BlazorAdmin auth)
data_sources.engine: Browser cookie store via JS interop
data_sources.notes: Used for auth token persistence on the Blazor admin client. confidence 0.75
